sections.paragraph:
Original: יאל

Transliteration: yâ'al

Phonetic: yaw-al'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be foolish, become fools, act foolishly, show wicked folly
    1. (Niphal)
      1. to show wicked folly
      2. to become fools

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 830

Part(s) of speech: Verb
